prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 21571→25592→24480→26345→46462，2025 年因大幅扩招位次暴跌约 2 万名，基准约 46462 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 11→14→14→17→33 人，2025 年扩招近一倍；2026 年计划 36 人，较 2025 年继续扩招 3 人，扩幅缩小至约 9%，竞争压力较 2025 年有所缓解但仍高于往年。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 137 名（2026 年），近年排名在 128–170 之间波动，属中后段 211；2022 年曾因宿舍条件出现偏负面舆情；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合（图书馆管理事件）；抖音热度一般（总排名第 104），短视频平台关注度不高，未出现明显报考热度信号；第五轮学科评估中无 A-/A/A+ 级别学科，优势学科不突出，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业含通信工程、计算机科学与技术、软件工程等，属高热推荐方向，对考生有一定吸 引力；江西省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 47.49 万，较 2025 年略有增加，按近年比例估算物理类考生约 26.78 万，竞争略加剧；宁夏大学位于西北地区，距江西较远，地域偏好上不占优势；该校在江西招生占比约 2.7%（2025 年），属外省普通招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次因大幅扩招已深度后移、2026 年扩幅缩小、考生规模略增、专业热度偏正面但学校层次与地域吸引力一般，预计 2026 年位次较 2025 年小幅回升（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约 48796 名，区间 48296–49296 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 21571 → 25592 → 24480 → 26345 → 46462. In 2025, due to a significant enrollment expansion, the ranking dropped by about 20,000 places, with a baseline around 46462. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 11 → 14 → 14 → 17 → 33 respectively, with a near doubling in 2025. The 2026 plan is 36, continuing an increase of 3 from 2025, with an expansion rate reduced to about 9%, easing competitive pressure compared to 2025 but still higher than previous years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 137th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), fluctuating between 128 and 170 in recent years, placing it in the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities. In 2022, there was a somewhat negative public opinion incident regarding dormitory conditions. In 2026, reputation is assessed as neutral/mixed (library management incident). Douyin popularity is average (overall rank 104), with low attention on short video platforms and no clear signal of application heat. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A-/A/A+ level disciplines, and advantageous disciplines are not prominent, limiting appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors include Communication Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, etc., which are high-demand recommended directions and attract candidates to some extent. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025. Based on recent proportions, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 267,800, with slightly intensified competition. Ningxia University is located in the northwest region, far from Jiangxi, and does not have an advantage in regional preference. The university's enrollment share in Jiangxi is about 2.7% (2025), representing a normal scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has already shifted significantly downward due to substantial enrollment expansion, the 2026 expansion rate is reduced, the candidate pool slightly increases, major popularity is somewhat positive, but the university's tier and regional appeal are average, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly recover (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 48796, with a range of 48296–49296.

- Computer Science and Technology (Yinchuan City, Ningxia Hui Autonomous Region) (Zhongwei Campus)
- Software Engineering (Yinchuan City, Ningxia Hui Autonomous Region) (Zhongwei Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (48296–49296), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<48296), prioritize Tier 1 majors like Communication Engineering and Computer Science. For rankings near the upper bound (>49296), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 5284→4964→5424→6230→6296, showing a general backward trend in recent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1300 places over the past 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 6296; the provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 7→6→6→11→12 students respectively, with a significant expansion in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 9 students, a reduction of 3 students (-25%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately ranked 137th on the Soft Science main list (2026), belonging to the middle-to-lower tier of 211 universities; there was a somewhat negative public opinion incident in 2022 regarding dormitory conditions; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity is average, with no obvious signal of application heat; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A-/A/A+ level disciplines, and the advantageous disciplines are not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors include History (Teacher Training), Ideological and Political Education (Teacher Training), and English (Teacher Training). The social popularity of teacher training majors is divided and uncertain, but the direction of publicly-funded teacher training still has some appeal; the total number of general college entrance examination takers in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 474,900, with an estimated 207,000 History Category examinees based on recent proportions, roughly the same as in 2025; Ningxia University is located in the northwest region, far from Jiangxi, and does not have an advantage in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the 25% reduction in the 2026 plan leading to intensified competition, the stable number of examinees, and the divided popularity of teacher training majors, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will shift slightly backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5402, with a range of 4902–5902.
